item.title: On Motivation: The Genuine and Counterfeit in Anime and Manga
item.author: æ»‘ç¿”é—ª
item.description: This article discusses the distinction between the genuine and the counterfeit in anime and manga, and why that distinction matters for understanding utilitarian ways of thinking.
